Package nonprofitbookkeeping.service

Class FileExportService

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.service.FileExportService
public final class FileExportService extends Object
Handles exporting ledger data to OFX/QFX statement files.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    FileExportService.ExportResult
    Result object describing the outcome of an export attempt.
    static enum 
    FileExportService.StatementFormat
    Supported statement formats.

  • Method Details

    • isSupportedStatementAccount

      public static boolean isSupportedStatementAccount(Account account)
      Determines whether an account is eligible for statement export.
      Parameters:
      account - account to inspect
      Returns:
      true if the account represents a bank or credit-card style ledger

    • exportAccountStatement

      public static FileExportService.ExportResult exportAccountStatement(File destination, Company company, Account account, FileExportService.StatementFormat format)
      Exports all transactions for the supplied account to an OFX/QFX file.
      Parameters:
      destination - the file to write (will be replaced if it already exists)
      company - active company providing ledger/chart context
      account - target account to export
      format - desired statement format (OFX or QFX)
      Returns:
      FileExportService.ExportResult describing success/failure details
